en: Honestly, I would not consider myself an expert in biomechanics because I do not know anything about it.
ko: 솔직히, 저는 생체역학 전문가라고 할 수 없어요. 아무것도 모르거든요.

en: Maybe it's the vaccine that has saved so many lives,
ko: 아마 그건 많은 생명을 구한 백신일 수도 있고,

en: but it shines soars if that's what it means to me.
I do know a little bit about biology,
but that would not be enough to show that I am ready for this.
ko: 그건 제가 준비됐다는 걸 보여주기엔 부족할 거예요.
